name: clawterm
description: ClawTerm — Windows-compatible terminal client for clawtermd

scripts.build: npm run bundle && node_modules/.bin/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/clawterm.exe
scripts.build:linux: npm run bundle && node_modules/.bin/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/clawterm-linux
scripts.build:macos: npm run bundle && node_modules/.bin/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-macos-x64 --output dist/clawterm-macos
scripts.build:all: npm run bundle && node_modules/.bin/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64 --output dist/clawterm
